guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"9okgo","text":"I list stock solutions that can be purchased pre-­‐mixed and sterilized.This is in an attempt to minimize variation to the degree possible. You can certainly prepare your own stock solutions at appropriate pH.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1h746","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6n93j","text":"I prepare this making 4 50ml conicals worth at one time to limit batch variability.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Make TE solution (10mM Tris-HCl, 1mM EDTA pH 8) 500 µL 1M Tris-HCl pH 8 100 µL 0.5M EDTA 49.6 mL Nuclease free water
Mix SpeedBead bottle thoroughly by shaking and vortexing.
Transfer 1 mL of SpeedBeads to a 1.5ml microtube.
Place microtube on magnetic stand until the beads are drawn to magnet.
Remove and discard supernatant.
Add 1 mL, TE to the beads and remove from the magnet.
Remove microtube from magnet and resuspend beads by mixing or vortexing.
go to step #4 This will be a total of 3 washes. Leave washed beads on rack until needed in Step 16.

Add 9 g, PEG-800 directly to a new sterile 50ml conical tube. Do this in chemical room. Tear the balance to 0 with the tube on the balance in a holder. Then weight out 9g into the tube. Seal tube and bring to bench to finish buffer.
Add 10 mL, 5M NaCl to the 50ml conical.
Add 500 µL, 1M Tris-HCl pH8 to the 50ml conical.
Add 100 µL, 0.5M EDTA pH8 to the 50ml conical.
Fill the 50ml conical to ~ 48 mL using nuclease free dH2O. You can do this by eye, just go slowly. I add 2 mL of water to get to about 20 mL then add 28.5 mL of water.
Mix conical for about 5-20 minutes until PEG goes into solution (solution, upon sitting, should be clear). The exact time of mixing is not critical. You can leave it longer without issue.
Add 270 µL, 10% Tween20 to the 50ml conical and mix gently.
Resusped the SpeedBead TE solution from Step 8 then add it to the 50ml conical with the SRPI buffer. I try to add the beads to the bottom of the 50ml conical.
Take buffer from the top of the 50ml conical tube and rinse out the eppendorf tube which contained the SpeedBeads to recover all the beads.
Fill conical to 50ml mark with dH2O (if not already there) and gently mix 50ml conical until a uniform brown color.
Wrap conical in tinfoil and store at 4C. I usually prep 4 x 50ml conicals at one time. Then pool them into an empty nuclease free water bottle for storage.

Test Home-Brew SPRI agains Ampure XP. I use total RNA and fragmented RNA to perform a head-to-head. You can also test using a cDNA library. Using RNA as the input serves as validation that there is no RNase activity in the solution.
Prepare fresh 80% ethanol.

Purify Total RNA and Fragmented RNA at 1x and 2x SPRI ratio. You can test whatever ratios you need to confirm are working for your assay. These are good tests for my use. Run purified sample on BioAnalyzer.
Total RNA 2x SPRI purification test results - 100ng/ul input
Fragmented RNA 1x SPRI purification test results - 15ng/ul input
creator: Sarah Boswell
